---
title: "Unemployment and Life Satisfaction"
author: "Michael Huber"
output: html_document
---

# Motivation

This project studies how unemployment affects life satisfaction using UKHLS panel data.

# Data

UKHLS data are access-restricted and therefore not included in this repository.

# Variable Construction

This section documents the main variables used in the analysis.

# Descriptive Evidence

This section presents summary statistics and descriptive figures.

# Regression Strategy

This section outlines the pooled, fixed-effects, and random-effects specifications.

# Event Study

This section presents the event-study design and coefficients around unemployment entry.

# Main Findings

Unemployment is associated with a substantial decline in life satisfaction.

# Limitations

Full replication requires authorized access to UKHLS data.
